info.title: AxisFi API 接口文档
info.description: 认证需同时提供 API Key 和 Secret

post.description: Create a new transfer to a recipient. The transfer can include an underlying conversion or offramp when the transfer/target currency varies from the source currency, or will not include a conversion when the transfer/target currency and source currency match.
Edit an existing recipient stored on the AxisFI platform.
Removes a recipient from the AxisFI platform.
Create a new recipient to be stored on the AxisFI platform. The recipient account can either be a bank account or a crypto wallet.
Retrieves real-time currency exchange rates or formal quotes for specified currency pairs. The Quote endpoint gives the user a guaranteed rate for an agreed period of time.
Uploads a single document or image to the server. Supports specific categories such as invoices and contracts. Returns a unique file ID and the accessible URL upon successful storage.

parameters.name: file_type
parameters.description:
File Type Code. Valid values vary based on the specific business scenario:

### 1. Customer Corporate Documents
* `Business Registration`: Official business license.
* `Article of Association`: Corporate constitutional documents.

### 2. Customer Legal Representative ID
* `Main page`: Front side of the ID card or Passport bio-data page.
* `Back page`: Back side of the ID card.

### 3. Transfer Documents Or Recipient Documents
* `Invoice`: Billing document for payment request.
* `Contract`: Supporting service/goods contract.

> **Note**: Ensure the uploaded `file_type` matches the specific business context (Customer,Recipient,Transfer).

schema.description:

### 3. Transfer Documents Or Recipient Documents

> **Note**: Ensure the uploaded `file_type` matches the specific business context (Customer,Recipient,Transfer).

post.description: Deposits funds into your AxisFI account
Edit an existing customer stored on the AxisFI platform.
Removes a customer from the AxisFI platform.
Create a new customer to be stored on the AxisFI platform.

get.description: Get list of wallets related to your AxisFI account.
Get list of transactions from a specified creation date/time, with optional filters on date range, transaction status (e.g., Pending, Completed, Failed), and currency pairs.
Get a specific transaction by specifying the (Id).
Get a specific recipient by specifying the (Id).
Retrieves the file by its unique identifier.
Get a specific customer by specifying the (Id).
Get available balances for every wallet.

X-API-Key.description: Includes an API key in the HTTP headers to authenticate the client.

X-API-Secret.description: Includes an API secret in the HTTP headers to authenticate the client.
